description: Phase 29 scan_manifest_phase_monotonic: config/engine_manifest.json phases[] must be P1..Pn contiguous with no gaps and no out-of-order entries. Append-only is the structural invariant of the phase evolution model — a gap (e.g. P1..P26, P28 skipping P27) signals a deleted phase, and an out-of-order entry signals mid-history insertion. Either breaks the assumption that phase N's commit lands after phase N-1's.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_manifest_phase_monotonic.json ] && jq -r "if .gap_count == 0 and .out_of_order_count == 0 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_manifest_phase_monotonic.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
